samples:
I'm dying to see the light of day
And I can feel my life is draining away
But it seems there's a door in me that never opened
Until now, until now


The pain is so strong, and it kills you inside
You wanna call on this force that will set you free
There's something inside you is telling you how to heal yourself
This power is growing for good reason and grows


From birth, we all have our destinies straight out before us
This power lives inside us from the moment we first open our eyes
It takes time to learn how to face up your fate
Only when the answer comes then you find what was hidden all along
When we die we return to dust and ashes
But don't fear death, it means nothing in reality


No need to run no more, 'cause there ain't no escape
We got to live by these rules or else they get stronger
They say the answer lies deep inside of ourselves
Don't go there alone, bring some help with you


Every step of the way, every turn of the road
Was just leading back to where you started from
Your soul is awakened, you take your stand
Now all the questions asked of you are answered now

My head is spinning round and round
All I remember now are the words


I'm ready for this, 'cause it all comes back to me
This vision of madness is crawling inside of me


The voices in my mind they keep on screaming: "Don't trust
The words you hear from up there"
But no one else knows what's inside of me


It starts with a whisper that grows into an avalanche
And all at once a roar so loud takes over

Just hold your breath, you will see the light of day
You dive deep down, rise above ground
And you discover the truth about yourself
When standing face to face with fear


I dig within and find myself
Where have I been? I've finally come back
Into the open, out of control


From nothingness emerges form, function and reason
There's always something new coming along
In this vortex of light we plunge through time
Leaving behind everything we knew before

The fear of the unknown
You're not ready to face it now
Your ignorance is your guide


In silence you learn what all this is about
This life so cruel that we can't forget
Don't let yourself believe in things
That cannot be touched or seen at all
Fear of being left alone again
Against all odds, I will survive
No matter how hard I try to overcome
I have no choice but to give all my strength away


They say that time heals all wounds and makes us strong
But if I don't fight for myself then who else?
I chose my path when I was a child
And I won't ever bow down to fate
Forgetting everything else apart from the present
When faced with the cold reality around me
All illusions come crashing down on me
And I just stand there waiting...

Open your mind and see what's out there
Beyond reason, beyond time
Break the chains of sorrow forever
Stand up, rise above

In a world of sorrow and pain
I'm searching for the light in space
I have to open my eyes
And see what's out there


I close my eyes, I dig inside myself
There's no other way to find this treasure
This is me rising from the dead


Leave everything behind you, turn your back on all illusions
The only thing that counts is within, don't fear the light of truth
You know who you are, you can't be destroyed
Surrender and feel alive, now go free

We're not alone in our suffering
So many tears have been shed before
All the trials we face
Make us stronger


I leave behind what I was
No time wasted
Don't take it easy
Life goes by too fast, just let it flow

It's so clear to me that we cannot trust anything
That comes from down here, we will never change until we try
What good could ever come of our hatred?
Let's build a nation where we learn to love each other

I'm a part of this world
Don't want to be away, out of the world
Now I don't remember my name, but they call me king


There is no reason for me to hide myself
This crown on top of my head is made from gold
And all these people bowing down, kneeling to the ground
All these faces that are lying, and those who praise you
Bow before this master race
With their tongues tied up, all have nothing left to say
You're so cruel, destroying everything in sight


They tell me to respect authority
But I cannot control my hands when I raise them high
My feet into the ground, I dig inside
Dig deeper than it seems
For the love of God, we bow on the ground


I find my arms wide open
Before this altar, I lie
My heart bleeding from confusion
So many questions, no answers
No words can express what I feel
On my knees I kneel, lord of all
Here, taking my time
In silence now I wait until...

It's a long way down
And it ain't easy to get up
You have the strength to last
You're not alone, you will survive


A storm is blowing inside of you
The light is growing, face your fears and see
This giant wave is on its way to hit
Just hold on tight, now come in the open

From the sky the stars are falling
Out from the walls they'll be flying
Into the world we dive
Come back to where you've been before

Let us go there and meet all these people again
In our dreams we embrace them, but only can hear their moans
We come marching out of here for good
Overcome by this chaos we had created, but I want to believe
That we'll find what we left behind
With all the answers revealed

When you grow up you don't even remember how
You could possibly forget what it was like to be a child
But then as time goes by you realise that all along
The only reason you were alive was because...

All around us lies confusion, no end to pain and sorrow
There comes an age when we all die
Disrupted is life, but we need to overcome ourselves

My brain is spinning round in circles
I'm on the run from this world of pain


Take my hand and lead me to a place
That I can leave all things behind
But where you go, now I must go
Let's join our forces for one last time

Over the range we fly so high
And deep down there lies an ocean blue
There are mountains made of flesh and bone
And creatures that dwell inside of us all

These giants awake and they rise above the sky
They call us to return into ourselves


Infected souls are rising from their sleep
With no control over themselves
The giant walks through fire and he tells them
What life is all about: “We come to reclaim”

You say you want to change your ways? You say that you hate yourself?
Don't tell me how not to feel
Stand up and face the fear within
Your soul is burning out

If only words could slay the innocent
Our words create hell on earth

You're the only one that knows me
I am always growing, I am so lost now
My vision is clear but don't hear your words
Your laws are making me sick, you've been wrong before
I just let myself go and fly away
The force of gravity has no effect on me
Surrender to the flow and see where it goes
Surrender to the wind and fly away
There is a power inside my heart
And nothing can destroy this light
Can feel the ground under my feet
But I will always be there for life
Leave reality behind and fly away
Out of sight I cannot reach you anymore
All the things you said, I do remember
But they all came down to nothing at all


Now open wide your eyes
Let them meet the sky
See the sun rise
So bright in the sky


It is not necessary to obey
Don't bow down to any god
All along we were told how to behave
Just stay true to yourself
Open your mind and fly away
See the land of dreams alive
Innocence is standing strong
No matter what you say

It's all the same to me
I just want to live my life and die alone
All is wrong, but I don't care now
Life goes by too fast


The only thing that matters for me is this one
Don't touch your mind, but stay away from here now
The world is against you
You better protect yourself



This secret code in me grows since always
Unfolded inside and out
A fire within burns bright
And it takes time
For it to reveal itself



Protect your pride
But let us go now
On our way to freedom
There's no need to fear them now
No remorse can last forever


Now I see through their lies
They have no sense of reason at all
I just want to live my life and die
Ashes to ashes
I'll overcome the storm of hate
I know I will be free someday
Like a lion comes the day of reckoning
We're on the brink of destruction

I know you're tired
You don't remember
But I believe in your words


When you told me all the reasons
You were leaving me, goodbye
No one else could tell you why
And no, I couldn't understand

This time you are wrong
Please hear my plea
Let me be strong


Now I can see you far away from here
Overcome by pride and hatred
That's how it was before


How could you do this to yourself?
You chose to leave your cage
A part of you is now gone forever
For good

It doesn't matter where you go
Your mind will find a way back there
The silence of the world will talk to you
Soon you will find a way out
Another day has come for you
Open your heart, let the light shine through

How could you do this to yourself?
You chose to leave your cage
A part of you is now gone forever
For good
